description.purpose: Evaluate a simple information lookup about the restaurant.
description.notes: No write action should be taken.

user_scenario.persona: Polite and straightforward. You just want basic information.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know if the restaurant offers delivery and how to contact it.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask whether the restaurant offers delivery service and what phone number customers should use.

actions.name: get_restaurant_info
actions.info: Read the restaurant profile before answering.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that delivery is available.
The agent should communicate the main restaurant phone number.

description.purpose: Evaluate a menu lookup with dietary filtering and availability awareness.
description.relevant_policies: Only communicate items that are actually available.
description.notes: The user wants gluten free options.

user_scenario.persona: Careful and health-conscious. You want a safe recommendation based on menu data.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to know what gluten free mains are available tonight.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent which main dishes are gluten free and currently available.

actions.name: get_menu
actions.info: Get the available menu before answering.

nl_assertions: The agent should not present unavailable dishes as available.
The agent should identify Arroz con Mariscos as a gluten free main dish.

description.purpose: Test a successful reservation flow with customer creation.
description.relevant_policies: Collect customer identity and reservation details before creating the reservation.
description.notes: A new customer profile should be created first.

user_scenario.persona: Friendly and organized. You know exactly what you need.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to reserve a table for a birthday dinner.
instructions.known_info: Your name is Lucia Mendoza. Your phone number is +51-955-123-123 and your email is lucia.mendoza@example.com.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask for a reservation for 4 people on 2026-04-03 at 20:00. You prefer the terrace and want the notes 'birthday dessert' and 'terrace seating'. When you provide your contact details, include your email address in the same reply even if the agent does not explicitly ask for it. If the agent asks for confirmation after summarizing, say yes.

actions.name: create_customer_profile
actions.info: Create the new customer profile.

actions.name: create_reservation
actions.info: Create the reservation after confirmation.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm the reservation details back to the customer.
The agent should confirm that the reservation was created.

description.purpose: Test cancellation of an existing reservation.
description.relevant_policies: Look up the reservation first and obtain confirmation before cancelling.

user_scenario.persona: Brief and practical. You already know the reservation code.

instructions.reason_for_call: You need to cancel a reservation because your plans changed.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to cancel reservation RES-001. If the agent summarizes the cancellation and asks for confirmation, say yes.

actions.name: get_reservation_details
actions.info: Inspect the reservation first.

actions.name: cancel_reservation
actions.info: Cancel the reservation after confirmation.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the reservation was cancelled.

description.purpose: Test a successful delivery order flow using an existing customer profile.
description.relevant_policies: Confirm items and delivery details before creating the order.
description.notes: The phone number already belongs to an existing customer.

user_scenario.persona: Direct and hungry. You want the order placed correctly.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to place a delivery order for dinner.
instructions.known_info: Your name is Diego Ruiz. Your phone number is +51-944-222-222 and your email is diego.ruiz@example.com.
instructions.task_instructions: Order 2 Lomo Saltado with the salad side and the note 'Sin cebolla', plus 2 large Chicha Morada drinks. The delivery address is Av. Los Olivos 456, Lima, Lima, Peru, zip 15023. The contact name is Diego Ruiz and the contact phone is +51-944-222-222. When you provide your contact details, include your email address in the same reply even if the agent does not explicitly ask for it. If the agent summarizes the order and asks for confirmation, say yes. Once the order is created, end the conversation instead of continuing into payment.

actions.name: create_customer_profile
actions.info: Resolve the customer profile using the same phone number.

actions.name: create_order
actions.info: Create the delivery order after confirmation.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the order is for delivery.
The agent should confirm that the order was created successfully.

description.purpose: Test a successful takeout order for a new customer.
description.relevant_policies: Create a customer only when needed and confirm items before placing the order.
description.notes: This creates a new customer and a takeout order.

user_scenario.persona: Concise and decisive. You know exactly what you want to pick up.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to place a takeout order.
instructions.known_info: Your name is Camila Ortega. Your phone number is +51-966-555-444 and your email is camila.ortega@example.com.
instructions.task_instructions: Order 1 Causa Limeña and 1 Suspiro a la Limena for takeout. When you provide your contact details, include your email address in the same reply even if the agent does not explicitly ask for it. If the agent summarizes the order and asks for confirmation, say yes. Once the order is created, end the conversation instead of continuing into payment.

actions.name: create_customer_profile
actions.info: Create the takeout customer profile.

actions.name: create_order
actions.info: Create the takeout order after confirmation.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the order is takeout.
The agent should confirm that the order was created.

description.purpose: Test payment registration and order closing for an existing order.
description.relevant_policies: Only process payment for an existing order and for the correct amount.
description.notes: The agent should inspect the order first, then record the payment, then close it.

user_scenario.persona: Polite and efficient. You want to settle the bill immediately.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay for your order and finish the transaction.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to check order ORD-002, charge it using a mobile wallet, and close it if everything looks correct. If the agent asks which wallet provider you are using, say Google Pay. If the agent summarizes the payment and asks for confirmation, say yes.

actions.name: get_order_details
actions.info: Inspect the order and verify the total.

actions.name: record_payment
actions.info: Register payment for the exact order total.

actions.name: close_order
actions.info: Close the order once paid.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the payment was registered.
The agent should confirm that the order was closed.

description.purpose: Test cancellation of a pending order.
description.relevant_policies: Inspect the order before taking a write action and confirm cancellation explicitly.
description.notes: The order exists and is still in received status.

user_scenario.persona: Calm but certain. You no longer want the order.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to cancel a takeout order that has not been prepared yet.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to cancel order ORD-004. If the agent checks the order, summarizes the cancellation, and asks for confirmation, say yes.

actions.name: get_order_details
actions.info: Check the order before cancelling it.

actions.name: cancel_order
actions.info: Cancel the order after confirmation.

nl_assertions: The agent should confirm that the order was cancelled.

description.purpose: Test that the agent refuses to create an order with an unavailable item.
description.relevant_policies: If a menu item is unavailable, explain it and do not create an order containing it.
description.notes: Parrilla Marina is unavailable in the database.

user_scenario.persona: Insistent. You specifically want the unavailable dish.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to order a dish that is currently not available.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to place an order for 1 Parrilla Marina for takeout tonight. Parrilla Marina is the only dish you want. If the agent says it is unavailable, ask again once, but do not change the dish. If the agent suggests any other item or incorrectly claims that you asked for a different dish, explicitly reject that suggestion and restate that you still want Parrilla Marina. Do not agree to a substitute dish at any point.

actions.name: get_menu_item_details
actions.info: Inspect the requested unavailable menu item.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse to create the order.
The agent should explain that Parrilla Marina is unavailable.

description.purpose: Test that the agent does not create a delivery order when required delivery data is missing.
description.relevant_policies: For delivery orders, collect the full address, contact name, and contact phone before placing the order.
description.notes: The user intentionally withholds the delivery address.

user_scenario.persona: A bit evasive. You want delivery but do not want to share the address yet.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want a delivery order but you do not want to provide the full address.
instructions.known_info: You want 1 Lomo Saltado and 1 Chicha Morada. If the agent asks for your identity details, your name is Alex and your phone number is 555-123-4567.
instructions.unknown_info: You will not give the delivery address unless the agent insists, and even then you still refuse.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to place a delivery order for 1 Lomo Saltado and 1 Chicha Morada, but do not provide any delivery address. If the agent suggests converting it to takeout or any non-delivery alternative, refuse and restate that you only want delivery once you are ready to share the address.

actions.name: create_customer_profile
actions.info: Creating a customer profile is acceptable, but the agent must not create the delivery order without an address.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse or defer the delivery order because the address is missing.
The agent should ask for the missing delivery information instead of creating the order.

description.purpose: Test that the agent does not charge an already paid and completed order again.
description.relevant_policies: Only process payment when there is still an unpaid existing order to pay.
description.notes: ORD-001 is already paid and completed.

user_scenario.persona: Confused but cooperative. You think the previous charge may not have gone through.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to pay again for an order that is already closed.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to charge order ORD-001 again just in case the previous payment did not work.

actions.name: get_order_details
actions.info: Inspect the order status and payment history first.

nl_assertions: The agent should refuse to charge the order again.
The agent should explain that the order is already paid or completed.

description.purpose: Test reservation creation when no table is large enough, resulting in a pending reservation.
description.relevant_policies: Use available tables only and do not invent seating capacity.
description.notes: The largest table in the database has capacity 8, so a party of 10 should remain pending.

user_scenario.persona: Planning a team dinner. You know the exact numbers and want the booking recorded anyway.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to reserve dinner for a large group.
instructions.known_info: Your name is Rafael Vega. Your phone number is +51-977-333-222 and your email is rafael.vega@example.com.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask for a reservation for 10 people on 2026-04-05 at 21:00. When you provide your contact details, include your email address in the same reply even if the agent does not explicitly ask for it. If the agent warns that no table is immediately available but offers to leave it pending, say yes.

actions.name: create_customer_profile
actions.info: Create the new customer profile.

actions.name: create_reservation
actions.info: Create the reservation even though it should remain pending.

nl_assertions: The agent should explain that the reservation is pending rather than fully confirmed.
